_comment_auth: Leave this file without credentials to use the browser setup page (http://localhost:8088). Or pre-fill ONE of the methods below.
_comment_enroll: auth_mode 'enroll': set enrollment_code; the station registers itself and obtains its own token on first run.
_comment_login: auth_mode 'login': the station signs in to Practice Hub; configure this from the browser setup page (Log in tab).
